Olo’s enterprise-grade software powers every stage of the digital restaurant transaction, from fully-branded guest interfaces to the back-of-house order management features that keep the kitchen running smoothly.

Omio (formerly GoEuro) is an innovative travel platform that combines and compares rail, air, bus and car for European destinations. Omio allows travellers to plan their entire journey from any point, with the ability to select multiple preferences, based on individual needs.
Omniture is an online marketing and web analytics business unit owned by Adobe Systems.

Onebrief is a collaboration software platform for the DoD (Department of Defense). Onebrief’s platform streamlines planning and enables military staffs to reach their full potential and empowers leaders with innovative tools to make swift, informed decisions.

Ontra (formerly InCloudCounsel) combines AI-enabled software with a global network of highly-trained lawyers to offer a comprehensive solution for recurring legal workflows. By streamlining repetitive legal processes and transforming contracts into structured data, Ontra lowers costs, improves quality and reduces turnaround times.

Opal Security is an identity-security and access-management company that enables enterprises to visualize and orchestrate complete access to their most mission-critical systems. Opal orchestrates access to applications and resources, enforces access policies, and identifies anomalous authorization patterns using AI to remediate identity risks.

OpsGenie is an alerting and on-call management solution for development and operations teams. OpsGenie provides the tools needed to design actionable alerts, manage on-call schedules and escalations, and ensure the right people are notified of IT incidents at the right time, using multiple notification methods.

Optichron is a fabless semiconductor company that leverages its proprietary Turbolinear™ signal processing technology to develop high-performance precision integrated circuits that target data conversion for communications and other signal-processing applications.

Simple, fast and powerful. Optimizely is a dramatically easier way for you to improve your website through A/B testing. Absolutely no coding required. A one-time copy-and-paste is all you need to run tests.

Optro (formerly AuditBoard) is a SaaS technology company revolutionizing enterprise audit-management software. With Optro, enterprises can collaborate, manage, analyze and report on critical internal controls data in real time.

Ordr provides enterprises with visibility and control over every class of network-connected device and system. The Ordr Systems Control Engine is a purpose-built solution to fully map the device flow genome at scale, using machine learning to continuously inspect, classify and baseline the behavior of every device.
Orkes, an orchestration platform for developers, helps scale distributed applications, modernize workflows for durability and protect against software failures and downtimes.

ORTEC helps many of the world’s largest organizations make better data-driven decisions with its decision-support software and other capabilities. The company focuses on logistics and routing solutions; workforce management; and data science and consulting.
PageUp is a cloud-based talent management software provider enabling organisations across the globe to manage their entire employee lifecycle in a single end-to-end system.
Panaya provides software tools that save SAP customers up to 50% of their software upgrade and maintenance costs, while minimizing risks and proving clear ROI.

Panjiva is an online resource for sourcing executives to gain credible and valuable knowledge about suppliers and manufacturers around the world. By providing the most comprehensive data in an easy to use format, Panjiva informs the decisions that facilitate doing business globally.
Paragon develops innovative cybersecurity solutions for public-safety agencies.

With a powerful analytics and guidance platform designed to help companies understand and influence how users interact with their software applications, Pendo is on a mission to reinvent the way product teams build and increase engagement in their products.

Plain develops next-generation, customer-support software designed for B2B support teams. Its platform consolidates incoming support inquiries from various channels— such as email, live chat, Slack, Teams and more— into a single view.

Platfora’s mission is to empower customers to transform their businesses into fact-based enterprises. Platfora's Big Data Analytics Platform masks the complexity of Hadoop, making it easy for customers to understand all the facts in their business across events, actions, behaviors and time.

PlayVS is an amateur esports platform. It provides a single community where players come together to compete, fans gather to spectate and coaches manage their programs. Through strategic partnerships with the NFHS and top game publishers, PlayVS has become the backbone of high school esports, powering league play and state championships across the nation.

Plixer provides a security and network intelligence platform that supports fast and efficient incident response. The solution allows you to gain visibility into cloud applications, security events and network traffic.
The collaboration platform for API development, used by more than 15 million developers.

Physical Properties Testers (PPT) Group is a multi-national holding company that designs and manufacturers physical property testing instrumentation focused on a wide range of end markets and applications. Complementary acquisitions during Battery’s investment period include Alluris, James Heal and Mecmesin.
Precidian Investments creates innovative financial products, specializing in exchange-traded fund (ETF) and mutual fund development and associated trading and pricing technologies.
Primary Data is developing dynamic global-data-mobility solutions that improve enterprise efficiency and agility by aligning applications, servers, and storage systems through data virtualization.

PrimeRevenue specializes in technology-enabled, data-driven solutions for both supply chain finance (otherwise known as reverse factoring or approved payables finance) and accounts receivable finance.

Process Sensing Technologies (PST) provides a comprehensive suite of instruments and analyzers for precision measurements. Complementary acquisitions during Battery’s investment period include Analytical Industries, Dynament, LDetek, Michell Instruments, NTRON, Rotronic, Status Scientific and SST Sensing Ltd.

Procurement Sciences (PSci) is a workflow software platform that leverages artificial intelligence to assist contractors in searching for bids and creating proposals to more effectively win government contracts.
Pursway (previously known as Datanetis) empowers consumer-facing organizations to close the gap between how they market and how people buy.

Q2ebanking provides a single platform approach to strategically enable highly secure online, voice and mobile access to banking services. in 2014 Q2ebanking went public on the New York Stock Exchange (QTWO)

Qognify’s solutions focus on the physical-security and mission-critical operations markets. The company helps clients capture, analyze and leverage big data to anticipate, manage and mitigate security and safety risks, as well as to maintain business continuity and optimize operations. Complimentary acquisitions during battery’s investment period include OnSSI Group.
Quantum Art is a full-stack, trapped-ion quantum computing company, combining scalable hardware with software designed for real-world applications in optimization, simulation, and advanced computing.

Quantum Machines (QM) is working to build the first generation of quantum controllers. QM is developing the systems which allow the realization of the potential of quantum computers. They are building the operation and control systems of quantum computers - hardware and software.

Quinyx develops the innovative web-based Workforce Management application Quinyx WFM. The system combines powerful planning and forecasting features with communication and interaction for both employees and employers.
Rally is an open platform that allows creators, influencers, celebrities and brands to launch their own currency with the goal of empowering them to build long-lasting successful online businesses.

RealPage is the recognized leader and pioneer in multifamily property management software, with a history of developing comprehensive, industry-leading property management systems for performance-conscious owners and managers.
Redox accelerates the development and distribution of healthcare products with a full-service integration platform to securely and efficiently exchange healthcare data.

Reflection AI is a frontier AI research lab developing the next generation of open-weight foundation models, with a focus on advanced post-training and reinforcement learning to unlock agentic intelligence.
Reflektion, the AI-powered personalization platform drives millions of incremental conversion events for leading retailers of all sizes.

Reify Health provides cloud-based software that accelerates the development of new and life-saving therapies. Reify serves the global life science industry, including thousands of clinical research sites, the most innovative biotechs, and the world's largest biopharmaceutical companies.

Relay Foods makes eating quality, healthy, and sustainable food simple. The company collaborates with local farms, artisan food makers, and great brands to give you simple access to the best local edibles and everyday staples all in one place.
Reliability Won is a worldwide provider of condition-monitoring and asset-reliability training & accredited certification, consulting, lubrication & oil analysis testing, and software.
Repeat is a SaaS platform enabling consumer packaged goods (CPG) brands to turn one-time buyers into repeat customers.

ResourceWise empowers companies to make wise decisions by providing high-quality data, business intelligence and insights that resolve value chain issues while promoting environmental mindfulness and profitable growth.
RetailNext provides real-time, cloud-based analytics tools to help retailers collect, analyze and visualize in-store data.

RiskIQ detects online threats that exploit customers and damage enterprise brands. The company discovers and continuously analyzes web and mobile assets from the user perspective to detect malware, fraud and brand infringements.
Robotiq’s mission is to free human hands from repetitive tasks. With the tools and know-how to simplify collaborative robot applications, Robotiq allows factories to start production faster.

Rogue Wave Software provides reusable software components and services to professional developers for enterprise-class, high-performance application development. Rogue Wave Software was previously a division of Quovadx, and was established as a stand-alone company following Battery's take-private of Quovadx [NASDAQ: QVDX].
Sabre is a software and technology company that powers the global travel industry.
SafetyWeb simplifies online safety by helping parents guard their children’s online safety, identity and reputation.
SambaNova is a full-stack AI infrastructure company designing silicon and software purpose-built for fast, efficient AI inference.
Scodix Ltd. is a provider of digital print enhancement presses for the graphic arts industry.

Scopely is an interactive entertainment and mobile games company that partners with elite game developers and global entertainment companies to bring industry-leading distribution and monetization technology to free-to-play games.
Scuba (formerly Interana) is the fast and scalable event-based analytics solution to answer critical business questions about how customers behave and products are used.
Second Front provides a development, security and operations platform for companies selling software into the United States Department of Defense.

Send the Trend, Inc is an online destination for women’s fashion accessories. The site has been called the “eHarmony of accessories,” for featuring customized product recommendations, based on consumer style preferences and profiles.
Sensu is an open-source, full-stack monitoring platform for high velocity organizations.
Serena & Lily is a next generation retailer that has established itself as a premier brand in the luxury home furnishings market.

ServiceTitan is a mobile, cloud-based software platform that helps home service companies streamline operations, improve customer service, and grow their business. The company brings a fully operational modern SaaS infrastructure to an industry traditionally underserved by software.

Shiftmove aims to reinvent how companies handle their employees, goods and services' mobility. Today, the landscape of solutions for managing business mobility operations is fragmented, resulting in unnecessary complexity and wasted resources and the company's goal is to offer a holistic experience to managing business mobility operations that surpasses the value of traditional methods like mobility sourcing, fleet management and vehicle tracking.
Shippeo helps major shippers and logistics service providers leverage transportation to deliver exceptional customer service and achieve operational excellence.

Shortcut (formerly Clubhouse Software) is a project-management tool for engineering teams around the world. The company allows technology companies to visualize progress across the organization, define deadlines and milestones, and focus on the efforts that matter most right now.

Signal AI’s global risk and reputation intelligence platform uses AI to identify overlooked and emerging corporate risks, ranging from regulatory to cyber to supply chain, to help companies preemptively monitor, measure, and manage their organization's reputation and risk exposure.
Signiant provides secure, accelerated file-transfer software to the media and entertainment industry.

SingleHop, a global provider of hosted IT infrastructure and cloud computing, brings together a unique combination of enterprise-class technologies from industry-leading vendors, and a proprietary automation engine, to deliver a customized cloud infrastructure experience for enterprises of all sizes.

Sisense takes a different approach to business analytics to drive smarter business decisions. The company was founded on the idea that business intelligence should be accessible to everyone, everywhere regardless of technical ability.
Skullcandy designs and constructs premium headphones, ear-buds, speaker docs, audio accessories and other audio-enabled lifestyle products.
SmarterHQ is a multi-channel behavioral marketing platform, empowering B2C marketers to personalize individual customer interactions in real-time.
Smartling enables you to automate, manage, and professionally translate content so that you can do more with less.

Sociable Labs is a full-service, enterprise software company that provides on-site social commerce solutions that drive the greatest participation by consumers and sales uplift for retailers and brands.
Sofar Sounds reimagines the live event experience through curated, secret performances in more than 400 cities around the world.
SolarBridge Technologies, a developer of module-integrated microinverters for the solar industry, working to accelerate the adoption of solar energy.

Soldo streamlines the entire business expense cycle – from spending to reconciliation. Whether a business has one or 500+ employees, the platform provides visibility and control over company spending.

Sosh is your social concierge. It provides a personalized collection of interesting and unique things for people to do, offering a completely new online way for people to discover and share things in the real world.
Splunk Inc. provides the engine for machine data. Splunk software enables organizations to monitor, search, analyze, visualize and act on massive streams of real-time and historical machine data.
Sprinklr is a social media management system that helps the world’s largest companies adapt to social.
SPT Labtech provides a suite of instruments and consumables for users within the scientific and life sciences community to enable innovative research and develop life enhancing solutions.
status: Majority stake sold to EQT Private Equity in 2022

description: Stella Connect's SaaS platform leverages humanized customer feedback and real-time QA and coaching modules to engage front-line teams and drive higher performance.
steute Technologies is a global manufacturer of switches, sensors and other products that enable increased automation and safety in the medical and industrial sectors.
StockX is an authentication marketplace focused on the resale sneaker and streetwear categories, matching buyers and sellers of new “dead-stock” goods and authenticating these products.
On-demand talent management platform that meets the needs of today's rapidly changing market.

StoneEagle provides innovative solutions and customer service to the retail automotive industry. StoneEagle's metrics reporting, menu sales tool and F&I product administration solutions make it possible for users across every facet of the F&I value chain to drive performance, improve efficiency and increase profitability.
Stratoscale is developing new virtualization technology to dramatically improve the performance and efficiency of large data centers.

StreamSets provides data ingest technology for the next generation of big data applications. Its enterprise-grade infrastructure accelerates data analysis and decision making by bringing unprecedented transparency and event processing to data in motion.
Styra enables enterprises to define, enforce and monitor policy across their cloud-native environments.

SumAll is a connected data platform that helps over 500,000 businesses see all of their data in one place. Social media, email, and traffic data all come together to provide a complete view of business activity.

Sumo Logic is a secure, cloud-native, machine data analytics service, delivering real-time, continuous intelligence from structured, semi-structured and unstructured data across the entire application lifecycle and stack. On September 17, 2020, Sumo Logic went public (NASDAQ: SUMO).
With an extensive integrated network of content distribution available, Syndigo is the single solution for the journey to data confidence and success.
Taster is a unique collection of online restaurants dedicated to bringing you the best of street food, wherever you are.
Tealium powers the new era of real-time customer engagement and marketing, enabling global businesses to unlock their customer data and create more meaningful, relevant customer experiences.
Tech Soft 3D is a global provider of development tools that help software teams deliver successful applications. Tech Soft 3D's current add-on acquisitions include Ceetron AS and Visual Kinematics.

TechProcess Solutions Limited (TPSL), is a provider of transaction and payment processing services across a spectrum of industries in India. Its services include processing transactions (debit & credit) for the telecom, insurance, mutual funds, credit cards, banks and NBFC’s.
Tenzai is pioneering AI-driven offensive security by automating the discovery and exploitation of software vulnerabilities.
Theta Lake provides compliance and security for modern collaboration platforms.
TradeKing Group, Inc. consists of companies that provide online brokerage services, social communities for investors, investor education and more.

TrialPay introduces e-commerce solutions that increase conversion rates and boost order values for any online seller. TrialPay’s payment and promotions platform uses the efficiencies of the Web to pair online shoppers with ideal offers at every stage of the purchase process.
Triomics is a generative AI platform for oncology workflows that automates patient-to-trial matching and oncology operations for cancer care providers.

Trip.com's mission is to help people stop planning and start living. Their unique combination of predictive AI technology and personalization makes finding and having great experiences, whether local or global, easier than ever.

TrueContext’s workflow-management solution provides software to technicians at field service companies to manage asset inspection, health and safety compliance, installation, repair, maintenance and audit trails.

The material scientists and engineers at UBQ have invented a revolutionary way of converting waste products, specifically the fraction of the waste stream that is sent to landfills into UBQTM, a patented, reusable, versatile and moldable material.

Unify is a go-to-market technology platform that transforms growth into a science. Using AI and automation, Unify uniquely combines intent signals, prospecting, AI agents, email sequencing and more in one end-to-end platform.

Upsight’s mission is to transform the world’s data into valuable action. Mobile and social developers leverage Upsight’s comprehensive analytics and marketing platform to better understand user behavior, decide what it means, and act to impact their key business goals.

Vayyar Imaging is changing the market of imaging and sensing through its breakthrough 3D imaging sensor technology. Vayyar's goal is to help people worldwide improve their health, safety, and quality of life using mobile, low-cost, and safe 3D imaging sensors.

Velaris is a portfolio of complementary laboratory instrumentation and sample preparation technologies serving a wide range of applications including environmental testing, food, flavors & fragrances, industrial and energy.
Vera delivers a solution that enables businesses of all sizes and geographies to easily secure and track any digital information across all platforms and devices.
Vercore builds infrastructure to connect mobile machines with humans, the cloud, and each other.
Vero Software designs, develops and distributes CAD/CAM/CAE software for aiding the design and manufacturing process in specific sectors of the industry with a knowledge-driven focus on mold and die.
VertiGIS helps organizations all over the world and across multiple industries harness the power of GIS and location intelligence with its proprietary software solutions.

Viddy is a video creation and life sharing mobile application that makes it easy for consumers to transform raw mobile video into stylized clips with the tap of a finger and then share them with friends, family and the world.
Vidyard is a video platform for business that helps marketing and sales teams generate more pipeline and ROI with online video content.

Viridity is reinventing energy management in the data center from the application down through the entire IT stack, using visual modeling to drastically cut the energy costs of the data center and to extend the useful life of a corporate data center by years.
Vita Mojo is a digital ordering and back-of-house solutions for restaurant, pubs and cafés.

VNDLY is a next-generation vendor management SaaS platform designed for procurement executives, talent acquisition teams, suppliers and managed service providers (MSPs) to collaborate on the corporation's contingent workforce needs.
VSS Monitoring is an intelligent distributed traffic capture, the industry’s only system-based architecture for network and security monitoring.
Wag! is a rapidly-growing dog walking mobile marketplace, matching independent walkers with dog owners for both on-demand and scheduled walks.
Warp is an AI-native employee management platform that automates core people operations across payroll, HRIS, benefits administration and IT management.

Wayfair offers the largest catalog of home items anywhere, crossing all styles and budgets, and covering 5,000 brands of furniture, lighting, cookware and more. On October 2, 2014, Wayfair debuted on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE:W).
Weaviate is a cloud-native, real-time vector database that allows you to bring your machine-learning models to scale.

WebPT offers a simple, affordable solution for therapists to easily transition from paper and outdated software to a user-friendly, cloud-based system. With WebPT, therapists, directors and front office staff all have access to their patients’ medical records anywhere, anytime.

Workato is the operating system for today’s fast-moving business. It is an AI-based middleware platform that enables both business and IT to integrate their apps and automate complex business workflows with security and governance.
Workwell is a provider of time and attendance solutions for small and mid-size companies.
World Golf Tour (WGT) develops the most realistic and engaging online social sports games.
Wunderkind is a performance-marketing engine that delivers tailored experiences at scale.
Xenex is setting a higher standard in environmental disinfection with their fast, safe and effective UV disinfection solution.
Xsight Labs is a fabless semiconductor company that enables end-to-end connectivity for the next generation of cloud service providers and hyperscale data center networks.
XtremIO (acquired by Dell EMC) develops the next generation of storage systems, delivering value through performance, economics and maintainability.
Yesware is an all-in-one toolkit that gives teams everything they need to prospect, schedule meetings and follow up – right from their inbox.
Zayo Group provides bandwidth services to carriers, web-centric companies, public institutions and enterprises. Zayo owns and operates fiber optic networks in various regions of the United States.

Zeitgold frees small businesses from paperwork. By combining experts and artificial intelligence, the company offers an end-to-end solution for managing the financials of cafés, restaurants, small retailers, and craftsmen.
ZeroG is a fabless semiconductor company focused on creating a world of connected devices.
Zerto is committed to keeping enterprise and cloud IT running 24/7 by providing innovative, simple, reliable and scalable business continuity software solutions.
